data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding service and provider restrictions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Service and provider restrictions'. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of these restrictions. This lack of information leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary evidence to assert a hard requirement failure is absent.
gaps: No evidence of service and provider restrictions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
